name: buywise-ai
description: BuyWise AI — AI-powered shopping intelligence platform (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript).

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public base URL of the deployed app, e.g. https://buywise-ai.herokuapp.com. Set BEFORE the first build so Next.js can inline it into the client bundle.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase project URL (Project Settings > API). Required to enable authentication.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key (server-only; never exposed to the browser).

AI_PROVIDER.description: auto | openai | rule-based. 'auto' uses OpenAI when OPENAI_API_KEY is set, otherwise the built-in rule-based engine.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key. Enables real AI responses.

CRON_SECRET.description: Bearer token required by the /api/cron/check-alerts endpoint. Configure Heroku Scheduler to call it.
